---
target_audience: B2B startup marketers revising pricing pages
viewer_problem: They keep polishing copy while buyers still compare only price
core_promise: Show the framing change that makes a higher tier feel justified
primary_takeaway: Anchors shape perceived value before feature details matter
lens: buyer psychology teardown
format: contrarian breakdown
tone: sharp but practical
cta: Audit your highest-priced plan against the decoy effect
why_this_version_should_exist: It turns abstract pricing theory into a concrete page review
---
target_audience: SaaS founders with discount-heavy sales cycles
viewer_problem: Discounts are masking weak positioning
core_promise: Explain how to tell when a pricing objection is really a packaging objection
primary_takeaway: Repeated discounting usually means the offer ladder is unclear
lens: sales pattern diagnosis
format: tactical explainer
tone: direct and diagnostic
cta: Pull three lost-call notes and tag the objection pattern
why_this_version_should_exist: It links pricing strategy to day-to-day deal review
